name: Rule Request
shortDescription: Request creation, modification, or renewal of a DFW firewall rule
description: Manages the lifecycle of NSX Distributed Firewall rules. Supports creating new rules, modifying existing rules, renewing expiring rules, and requesting rule deactivation. All rules undergo conflict detection before deployment and are tracked in the DFW Rule Registry.

variables.name: request_action
variables.label: Action
variables.helpText: Type of rule lifecycle action to perform

variables.name: existing_rule_id
variables.label: Existing Rule ID (for modify/renew/deactivate)
variables.helpText: Required for modify, renew, and deactivate actions. Select the rule from the DFW Rule Registry.

variables.name: rule_name
variables.label: Rule Name
variables.helpText: Descriptive name for the firewall rule

variables.name: source_group
variables.label: Source Group
variables.helpText: Source security group for the rule

variables.name: source_app_ci
variables.label: Source Application CI
variables.helpText: Application CI for the source group (required when Source Group is Application-Specific)

variables.name: source_system_role
variables.label: Source System Role
variables.helpText: System role for the source group (required when Source Group is Application-Specific)

variables.name: destination_group
variables.label: Destination Group
variables.helpText: Destination security group for the rule

variables.name: destination_app_ci
variables.label: Destination Application CI
variables.helpText: Application CI for the destination group

variables.name: destination_system_role
variables.label: Destination System Role
variables.helpText: System role for the destination group

variables.name: service_ports
variables.label: Service / Ports
variables.helpText: Protocol and ports (e.g., TCP/443, TCP/8080-8090, UDP/53)

variables.name: expiration_days
variables.label: Rule Expiration (Days)
variables.helpText: Number of days until the rule expires and requires review (max 365 days)

variables.name: justification
variables.label: Business Justification
variables.helpText: Business justification for the firewall rule request
